CriticalDefense0.fallback: While the Mech Part is below 50% durability, it takes 30% less damage.

CriticalStrikeDamage0.fallback: Increases the Spike Saw's critical strike damage by 25%.

Defense0.fallback: Reduces the damage the mech part takes by 10%.

Defense1.fallback: Reduces the damage the mech part takes by 15%.

Defense2.fallback: Reduces the damage the mech part takes by 20%.

FuelEfficiency2.fallback: Reduces the mech's fuel consumption by 5%.

HardenedSeeds0.fallback: Increases the Seed Shooter's impact damage by 1.

HoseHydroBlast0.fallback: Enables the Hydro Blast ability for the Irrigation Hose.

InventoryCapacity2.fallback: Increases the mech's inventory weight limit by 75 units.

KneeReinforcement0.fallback: Increases the distance the mech can fall before taking damage.

LockOnTargets2.fallback: Increases the maximum Seed Shooter Lock-on targets by 300.

OverloadInventoryCapacity0.fallback: Increases the mech's inventory weight limit by 150 units but increases all fuel consumption by 10%.

OverloadThrusterBoost0.fallback: Increases the mech's jump boost duration by 1.25s but increases all fuel consumption by 5%.

OverloadToolRange0.fallback: Increases the range of the tool by 100% but reduces the range of all other tools by 50%.

OverloadToolSpeed0.fallback: Increases the speed of the tool by 50% but reduces the speed of all other tools by 25%.

SpikeSawSwingDamage1.fallback: Increases the damage of the Spike Saw Sweeping Strike by 10.

SpikeSawSwingDamage2.fallback: Increases the damage of the Spike Saw Sweeping Strike by 15.

TrailblazerBoostRecharge2.fallback: Increases the boost recharge rate in the Trailblazer Transform Mode by 40%.

TransformActiveSpeed2.fallback: Increases the active speed of the Tractor Type Transform Mode by 30%.

TransformMoveSpeed1.fallback: Increases the movement speed of the Tractor Type Transform Mode by 20%.

TransformWidth2.fallback: Increases the width of the Tractor Type Transform Mode by 6 units.

UnstableToolRange0.fallback: Increases the range of the tool by 50% but reduces its speed by 15%.

UnstableToolSpeed0.fallback: Increases the speed of the tool by 30% but reduces its range by 25%.

VacuumHarvest0.fallback: Enables the Harvest Vortex Ability for the Resource Vacuum, pulling plants out of the ground in a concentrated area.

WaterEfficiency0.fallback: Reduces the water consumption of the Irrigation Hose by 5%.

WaterEfficiency1.fallback: Reduces the water consumption of the Irrigation Hose by 10%.

WaterEfficiency2.fallback: Reduces the water consumption of the Irrigation Hose by 15%.

WaterSurf0.fallback: Enables the mech to surf on water for 10s.

WaterSurf1.fallback: Enables the mech to surf on water for 15s.

WaterSurf2.fallback: Enables the mech to surf on water for 20s.

WaterTank0.fallback: Increases the mech's water tank capacity by 100.

WaterTank1.fallback: Increases the mech's water tank capacity by 200.

WaterTank2.fallback: Increases the mech's water tank capacity by 300.

WaterTankAddOn0.fallback: Increases the mech's water tank capacity by 50.

HosePressure1.fallback: Increase the Power of the <Mark1>Irrigation Hose</>, allowing it to wash away strong <Mark1>Slime</>.

HoseRange1.fallback: Increase the range of the <Mark1>Irrigation Hose</>. Liquids can be sprayed farther.

HoseRange3.fallback: The <Mark1>Irrigation Hose</> can spray Liquids <Mark2>even farther</>.

HoseSecondary.fallback:
While using <Mark1>Irrigation Hose</>:
Hold UseToolSecondary to charge <Mark1>Hydro Splash</>, press UseToolPrimary to fire.

The <Mark1>Irrigation Hose</> can fire big blobs of liquid that can splash on multiple <Mark1>Mounds</> at the same time.

HoseSplashSize1.fallback: The <Mark1>Irrigation Hose</>'s <Mark1>Hydro Splash</> splashes Liquids in a <Mark2>larger</> area.

HoseSplashSize2.fallback: The <Mark1>Irrigation Hose</>'s <Mark1>Hydro Splash</> splashes Liquids in an <Mark2>even larger</> area.

InventoryCapacity3.fallback: The Mech can store <Mark2>even more</> items before becoming Over-encumbered.

JackhammerBreaking1.fallback: Increase the Power of the <Mark1>Spike Saw</>, allowing it to break strong materials.

JackhammerBreaking3.fallback: The <Mark1>Spike Saw</> can break <Mark2>even stronger</> materials.

JackhammerDamage1.fallback: Increase the Damage of the <Mark1>Spike Saw</>, allowing it to break materials in fewer hits.

JackhammerDamage2.fallback: The <Mark1>Spike Saw</> can break materials in <Mark2>fewer</> hits.

JackhammerDamage3.fallback: The <Mark1>Spike Saw</> can break materials in <Mark2>even fewer</> hits.

Pathmaker.fallback:
While inside the Mech:
Hold Transform to select Mech <Mark1>Mode</>.

<Mark1>Pathmaker Mode</> allows the Mech to freely create Paths on the ground.

Plough.fallback:
While inside the Mech:
Hold Transform to select Mech <Mark1>Mode</>.

<Mark1>Field Plow Mode</> allows the Mech to freely create fields of Mounds on the ground.

SeedShooterLockOns1.fallback: The <Mark1>Seed Shooter</> can Lock On to up to <Mark2>18</> <Mark1>Mounds</>.

SeedShooterLockOns2.fallback: The <Mark1>Seed Shooter</> can Lock On to up to <Mark2>32</> <Mark1>Mounds</>.

SeedShooterLockOns3.fallback: The <Mark1>Seed Shooter</> can Lock On to up to <Mark2>64</> <Mark1>Mounds</>.

SeedShooterSecondary.fallback:
While using <Mark1>Seed Shooter</>:
Hold UseToolSecondary to <Mark1>Lock On</>, press UseToolPrimary to fire.

The <Mark1>Seed Shooter</> can Lock On to and automatically hit up to 9 <Mark1>Mounds</>.

Thrusters1.fallback: Increase <Mark1>Thruster Boost</>, allowing the Mech to jump higher and stay in the air for longer.

Thrusters2.fallback: The Mech can jump <Mark2>even higher</> and stay in the air for <Mark2>even longer</>.

VacuumRange1.fallback: Increase the range of the <Mark1>Vacuum Harvester</>, allowing it to reach resources from farther away.

VacuumStrength1.fallback: Increase the Power of the <Mark1>Vacuum Harvester</>, allowing it to suck up strong <Mark1>Weeds</>.

VacuumWidth1.fallback: Increase the width of the <Mark1>Vacuum Harvester</>, allowing it to gather resources in a wide area.

VacuumWidth2.fallback: The <Mark1>Vacuum Harvester</> can gather resources in a <Mark2>wider</> area.

WaterTankCapacity1.fallback: Increase <Mark1>Water Tank Capacity</>. The Mech can store more water in its Water Tank.

WaterTankCapacity2.fallback: The Mech can store <Mark2>more</> water in its Water Tank.

WaterTankCapacity3.fallback: The Mech can store <Mark2>even more</> water in its Water Tank.

Lawnmower.fallback:
While inside the Mech:
Hold Transform to select Mech <Mark1>Mode</>.

<Mark1>Lawnmower Mode</> allows the Mech to freely cut grass on the ground.

SeedShooterPower1.fallback: Increase the Power of the <Mark1>Seed shooter</>, allowing it to shoot strong  <Mark1>Bulbs</>. WIP

SeedShooterPower2.fallback: Increase the Power of the <Mark1>Seed shooter</>, allowing it to shoot strong  <Mark1>Bulbs</>. WIP

PlatedMech1.fallback: Increase the Power of the <Mark1>Mech Armor</>, allowing it to destroy stong <Mark1>Algae</>.WIP

PlatedMech2.fallback: Increase the Power of the <Mark1>Mech Armor</>, allowing it to destroy stong <Mark1>Algae</>.WIP

Car.fallback:
While inside the Mech:
Hold Transform to select Mech <Mark1>Mode</>.

<Mark1>Trailblazer Mode</> allows the Mech to travel long distances in a short amount of time.
